# Right PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 174.683 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 2.2154
  biquad b0=1.00089368054 b1=-1.99553697005 b2=0.994773717264 a1=-1.99553697005 a2=0.9956673978
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 143.921 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 6.6667
  biquad b0=1.00024507147 b1=-1.99872320733 b2=0.998566811383 a1=-1.99872320733 a2=0.998811882849

  biquad b0=1.0017974465 b1=-1.99101673394 b2=0.989488454531 a1=-1.99101673394 a2=0.991285901028

  biquad b0=1.00942519853 b1=-1.94844527607 b2=0.944881028124 a1=-1.94844527607 a2=0.954306226654

  biquad b0=1.00052845097 b1=-1.99705602357 b2=0.996909595693 a1=-1.99705602357 a2=0.997438046663
